_meta.description: Clarification prompts for scoped and high-risk document intelligence queries.

prompts.trigger: Multiple documents match a doc alias query

prompt.en: I found multiple matching documents. Which one should I use: {{options}}?
prompt.pt: Encontrei varios documentos correspondentes. Qual voce quer usar: {{options}}?

prompts.trigger: Query is time-sensitive but no period is specified

prompt.en: Which period should I use (example: Jan 2025, Q1 2024, or current billing cycle)?
prompt.pt: Qual periodo devo usar (ex.: Jan 2025, Q1 2024, ou ciclo atual)?

prompts.trigger: Compare intent lacks one explicit side

prompt.en: To compare, please provide both documents or choose 'across all my docs' if you want a broad scan.
prompt.pt: Para comparar, indique os dois documentos ou escolha 'em todos os documentos' para varredura ampla.

prompts.trigger: Query contains a numeric value with ambiguous unit

prompt.en: I can answer both ways; should I treat this as {{unitA}} or {{unitB}}?
prompt.pt: Posso responder de duas formas; devo usar {{unitA}} ou {{unitB}}?

prompts.trigger: A role/party term is ambiguous in legal/financial context

prompt.en: This query mentions '{{entity}}'. Is this the {{roleA}} or {{roleB}}?
prompt.pt: A consulta menciona '{{entity}}'. Refere-se a {{roleA}} ou {{roleB}}?

rules.trigger: query is ambiguous but no clarification prompt fired
period-dependent query is processed without period question
rules.check: context.queryNeedsPeriod == true AND context.periodResolved == false AND context.clarificationPromptIds.excludes('CLAR_002_period_missing')

rules.trigger: numeric value has multiple plausible units
legal or finance query has mixed party terms
rules.check: context.domain IN ['legal','finance'] AND context.partyRoleAmbiguous == true AND context.clarificationPromptIds.excludes('CLAR_005_entity_role')

templates.text: Use machine-actionable policy fallback when a specific template is missing in clarification_prompts.
